info.brief: A versatile camera suite and render pipeline
info.description: A versatile camera suite and render pipeline

elements.name: create_camera
elements.brief: Creates a camera. This function is called automatically by the rendy.go game object.
elements.description: Creates a camera. This function is called automatically by the rendy.go game object.

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

elements.name: destroy_camera
elements.brief: Destroys a camera. This function is called automatically by the rendy.go game object.
elements.description: Destroys a camera. This function is called automatically by the rendy.go game object.

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera to be destroyed.

elements.name: set
elements.brief: Sets a camera property. This function replaces the standard go.set().
elements.description: Sets a camera property. This function replaces the standard go.set().

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: property
parameters.doc: The property to be set.

parameters.name: value
parameters.doc: The value to set the property to.

elements.name: animate
elements.brief: Animates a camera property. This function replaces the standard go.animate().
elements.description: Animates a camera property. This function replaces the standard go.animate().

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: property
parameters.doc: The property to be animated.

parameters.name: playback
parameters.doc: The playback mode of the animation.
types: typeof go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_BACKWARD | typeof go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_FORWARD | typeof go.PLAYBACK_LOOP_PINGPONG | typeof go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_BACKWARD | typeof go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_FORWARD | typeof go.PLAYBACK_ONCE_PINGPONG

parameters.name: to
parameters.doc: The target value of the animation.

parameters.name: easing
parameters.doc: The easing function for the animation.
types: Vector3 | typeof go.EASING_INBACK | typeof go.EASING_INBOUNCE | typeof go.EASING_INCIRC | typeof go.EASING_INCUBIC | typeof go.EASING_INELASTIC | typeof go.EASING_INEXPO | typeof go.EASING_INOUTBACK | typeof go.EASING_INOUTBOUNCE | typeof go.EASING_INOUTCIRC | typeof go.EASING_INOUTCUBIC | typeof go.EASING_INOUTELASTIC | typeof go.EASING_INOUTEXPO | typeof go.EASING_INOUTQUAD | typeof go.EASING_INOUTQUART | typeof go.EASING_INOUTQUINT | typeof go.EASING_INOUTSINE | typeof go.EASING_INQUAD | typeof go.EASING_INQUART | typeof go.EASING_INQUINT | typeof go.EASING_INSINE | typeof go.EASING_LINEAR | typeof go.EASING_OUTBACK | typeof go.EASING_OUTBOUNCE | typeof go.EASING_OUTCIRC | typeof go.EASING_OUTCUBIC | typeof go.EASING_OUTELASTIC | typeof go.EASING_OUTEXPO | typeof go.EASING_OUTINBACK | typeof go.EASING_OUTINBOUNCE | typeof go.EASING_OUTINCIRC | typeof go.EASING_OUTINCUBIC | typeof go.EASING_OUTINELASTIC | typeof go.EASING_OUTINEXPO | typeof go.EASING_OUTINQUAD | typeof go.EASING_OUTINQUART | typeof go.EASING_OUTINQUINT | typeof go.EASING_OUTINSINE | typeof go.EASING_OUTQUAD | typeof go.EASING_OUTQUART | typeof go.EASING_OUTQUINT | typeof go.EASING_OUTSINE

parameters.name: duration
parameters.doc: The duration of the animation.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.doc: Optional delay before starting the animation.

parameters.name: complete_function
parameters.doc: Optional function to be called when the animation is complete.
types: (this: any, url: Url, property: Hash) => void

elements.name: cancel_animations
elements.brief: Cancels a camera property animation. This function replaces the standard go.cancel_animations().
elements.description: Cancels a camera property animation. This function replaces the standard go.cancel_animations().

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: property
parameters.doc: The property of the animation to be cancelled.

elements.name: get
elements.brief: Gets a camera property. This function is equivalent to the standard go.get().
elements.description: Gets a camera property. This function is equivalent to the standard go.get().

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: property
parameters.doc: The property to be retrieved.

returnvalues.doc: The value of the specified property.

elements.name: get_display_size
elements.brief: Gets the initial window size specified in the game.project file.
elements.description: Gets the initial window size specified in the game.project file.

elements.name: get_stack
elements.brief: Gets camera ids whose viewports intersect a screen position.
elements.description: Gets camera ids whose viewports intersect a screen position.

parameters.name: screen_x
parameters.doc: The x-coordinate of the screen position.

parameters.name: screen_y
parameters.doc: The y-coordinate of the screen position.

elements.name: shake
elements.brief: Starts a camera shake animation. If the camera is already shaking, then the animation is cancelled and restarted.
elements.description:
Starts a camera shake animation. If the camera is already shaking, then the animation is cancelled and restarted.
The radius is increased or decreased over time if the scaler argument is ~= 1.

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.doc: The initial radius of the camera shake.

parameters.name: intensity
parameters.doc: The intensity of the camera shake.

parameters.name: duration
parameters.doc: The duration of the camera shake animation.

parameters.name: scaler
parameters.doc: Optional scaler argument for adjusting the radius over time.

elements.name: cancel_shake
elements.brief: Cancels an ongoing camera shake animation.
elements.description: Cancels an ongoing camera shake animation.

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

elements.name: screen_to_world
elements.brief: Converts a screen position to a world position. The screen position's z component maps to the camera frustum's z component.
elements.description: Converts a screen position to a world position. The screen position's z component maps to the camera frustum's z component.

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: screen_position
parameters.doc: The screen position to be converted.

elements.name: world_to_screen
elements.brief: Converts a world position to a screen position. The world position's z component maps to the camera frustum's z component.
elements.description: Converts a world position to a screen position. The world position's z component maps to the camera frustum's z component.

parameters.name: camera_id
parameters.doc: The identifier for the camera.

parameters.name: world_position
parameters.doc: The world position to be converted.
